steps.title: Express the 9% increase algebraically
steps.content:
Increasing x by 9% means we add 9% of x to the original value.

Convert 9% to decimal: $$9\% = 0.09$$
So the increased value is: $$x + 0.09x$$

steps.title: Factor and simplify
steps.content:
Factor out x from both terms:
$$x + 0.09x = x(1 + 0.09) = 1.09x$$
That confirms A is correct.
